Uses of Class
com.gencior.triton.config.TritonClientConfig.Builder

Packages that use TritonClientConfig.Builder
Package
Description
com.gencior.triton.config
 

  • Uses of TritonClientConfig.Builder in com.gencior.triton.config

    Methods in com.gencior.triton.config that return TritonClientConfig.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TritonClientConfig.Builder
    TritonClientConfig.Builder.clientCertFile(File clientCertFile)
    Sets the client certificate file for mutual TLS (PEM format).
    TritonClientConfig.Builder
    TritonClientConfig.Builder.clientKeyFile(File clientKeyFile)
    Sets the client private key file for mutual TLS (PEM format).
    TritonClientConfig.Builder
    TritonClientConfig.Builder.maxInboundMessageSize(int maxInboundMessageSize)
    Sets the maximum inbound gRPC message size in bytes.
    TritonClientConfig.Builder
    TritonClientConfig.Builder.timeout(long timeoutMs)
    Sets the default timeout for client operations.
    TritonClientConfig.Builder
    TritonClientConfig.Builder.tlsEnabled(boolean tlsEnabled)
    Enables or disables TLS for gRPC communication.
    TritonClientConfig.Builder
    TritonClientConfig.Builder.trustCertFile(File trustCertFile)
    Sets the root CA certificate file for server verification (PEM format).
    TritonClientConfig.Builder
    TritonClientConfig.Builder.verbose(boolean verbose)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Logging is now managed via SLF4J.
